---
name: Claim year range
about: Reserve a range of years to research
title: 'Claim: years [START] to [END]'
labels: claim
---

**Year range:** [START] to [END] (e.g., 1200 to 1250 CE)

**Estimated completion:** [date or timeframe]

**Your approach:** [Brief description — are you using the meta-prompt, a specialized prompt, manual research?]

**Regional focus (if any):** [e.g., "Focusing on East Asian events for this period"]
